name: Resource Group Lifecycle Management
description: Create, list, tag, and delete Azure resource groups to organize and manage cloud resources effectively.

steps.title: Create a resource group with tags
steps.command: az group create --name dev-rg --location eastus --tags Environment=dev Team=backend
steps.description: Tags make it easy to filter resources by environment, team, or cost center.

steps.title: List all resource groups
steps.description: Displays all resource groups in the subscription in a readable table format.

steps.title: Show resources inside a group
steps.description: Lists every resource contained within the specified resource group.

steps.title: Update tags on a resource group
steps.command: az group update --name dev-rg --tags Environment=staging Team=backend Sprint=42
steps.description: Replaces all tags on the resource group with the new set.
steps.warning: This replaces all existing tags. Use 'az tag update --operation merge' to add tags without removing existing ones.

steps.title: Delete a resource group
steps.description: Deletes the group and all resources inside it. The --no-wait flag returns immediately.
steps.warning: This permanently deletes all resources in the group. This action cannot be undone.

fullScript:
# Resource group lifecycle management
az group create --name dev-rg --location eastus --tags Environment=dev Team=backend
az group list --output table
az resource list --resource-group dev-rg --output table
az group update --name dev-rg --tags Environment=staging Team=backend Sprint=42
# Careful: this deletes everything in the group
az group delete --name dev-rg --yes --no-wait

faq.question: Can I move resources between resource groups?
faq.answer: Yes. Use 'az resource move --destination-group new-rg --ids <resource-id>'. Not all resource types support moves, so check the documentation first.

faq.question: Is there a limit on how many resource groups I can have?
faq.answer: The default limit is 980 resource groups per subscription. You can request an increase through Azure support.
